summary: Portfolio Intelligence dual-mode testing complete. All 10 requested features verified working correctly. Backend API tests (19/19 passed) and frontend UI tests (all 4 user scenarios passed).
critical_code_review_comments: Dual-mode IntelligenceSurface correctly detects portfolio mode via: isPortfolioMode = canAccessWHERE && !canAccessHOW
Portfolio API returns sites ranked by VaR descending (warehouse $395 > riverside $213)
Focus site correctly identifies highest VaR site with 'Focus here first' callout
Admin user correctly defaults to operator mode (has both HOW and WHERE lenses)
WebSocket integration working for operator mode with Live indicator
Traceability chain expands correctly showing State -> Priority -> Intervention -> Outcome flow
seed_data_creation: Demo seed endpoint /api/system/demo/seed-portfolio creates warehouse site with 2 priorities ($395 VaR)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio Intelligence dual-mode fully working. Portfolio users see site cards ranked by VaR with 'Focus here first' callout. Operator/Admin users see priority cards with WebSocket Live indicator and expandable traceability chain. Total VaR across 2 sites is $608/day (warehouse $395 + riverside $213).

portfolio_api_structure.details: Returns correct structure with summary, sites, outcomes, trust, focus_site

portfolio_badge.details: Portfolio user sees 'Portfolio' badge in header

focus_site_callout.details: Shows 'Focus here first' with Warehouse Distribution Center ($395/day)

operator_mode.details: Operator sees ranked priorities with WebSocket Live indicator

admin_mode.details: Admin sees operator mode (not portfolio mode)

traceability_chain.details: Expandable trace showing State -> Priority -> Intervention -> Outcome

trust_metrics.details: Verification rate, actions validated, learning improvement all displayed

outcomes_aggregation.details: Portfolio shows per-site outcomes, operator shows individual outcomes
